CREATE TABLE datetime_test (id INT, event_time DATETIME);
SELECT dt_set_tz(event_time, 60) AS modified_time FROM datetime_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dt_set_tz(event_time, -120) AS modified_time FROM datetime_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT dt_set_tz(dt_set_tz(event_time, -30), 90) AS nested_modified_time FROM datetime_test;
SELECT dt_set_tz(event_time, 0) AS utc_time FROM datetime_test WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM datetime_test);
SELECT dt_set_tz(event_time, 150) AS new_timezone_time FROM datetime_test WHERE event_time > '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE timezone_test (id INT, local_time DATETIME, tz_offset INT);
INSERT INTO timezone_test (id, local_time, tz_offset) VALUES (1, '2023-02-01 08:00:00', -60);
INSERT INTO timezone_test (id, local_time, tz_offset) VALUES (2, '2023-02-02 09:00:00', 120);
SELECT dt_set_tz(local_time, tz_offset) AS adjusted_time FROM timezone_test;
SELECT dt_set_tz(event_time, NULL) AS no_change_time FROM datetime_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT dt_set_tz(event_time, 30) FROM datetime_test ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT dt_set_tz(event_time, 15) AS adjusted_time FROM datetime_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM datetime_test WHERE event_time < '2023-01-03 00:00:00');
